2604.26355.title: Shorthand for Thought: Compressing LLM Reasoning via Entropy-Guided Supertokens
2604.26355.paper_summary: Reasoning in Large Language Models incurs significant inference-time compute, yet the token-level information structure of reasoning traces remains underexplored. We observe that reasoning tokens split into two functional types: low-entropy \textit{structural} tokens (recurring phrases that scaffold the reasoning process) and higher-entropy \textit{organic} tokens (problem-specific content that drives toward a solution). This asymmetry motivates a simple, model-agnostic compression pipeline: apply cross-word BPE merges on a model's own reasoning traces to derive \textit{supertokens} that capture frequent structural patterns, then teach the model to adopt them via supervised fine-tuning. Across three model families and five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, our approach shortens reasoning traces by 8.1\% on average with no statistically significant accuracy loss on any model--benchmark pair. Beyond compression, supertokens act as interpretable reasoning-move annotations (backtracking, verification, strategy shifts), exposing the model's high-level strategy at a glance. Analyzing transitions between structural categories reveals systematic differences between correct and incorrect traces: correct traces show productive recovery (backtracking followed by strategy shifts and verification), while incorrect traces are dominated by confusion cycles (repeated hedging and unresolved contradictions). These diagnostic signals suggest applications in reward shaping and early stopping for RL-based reasoning training.
2604.26355.paper_summary_zh: 推理在大型語言模型中會產生顯著的推理時間計算，但推理痕跡的標記級信息結構仍然未被充分探討。我們觀察到推理標記分為兩種功能類型：低熵的 \textit{結構性} 標記（支撐推理過程的重複短語）和高熵的 \textit{有機} 標記（推向解決方案的問題特定內容）。這種不對稱性促使了一個簡單的、與模型無關的壓縮管道：對模型自身的推理痕跡應用跨單詞 BPE 合併，以推導出捕捉頻繁結構模式的 \textit{超標記}，然後通過監督微調教導模型採用它們。在三個模型家族和五個數學推理基準中，我們的方法平均縮短了推理痕跡 8.1\%，且在任何模型—基準對上均未出現統計上顯著的準確性損失。除了壓縮，超標記還作為可解釋的推理步驟註釋（回溯、驗證、策略轉變），一目了然地揭示模型的高層策略。分析結構類別之間的轉變揭示了正確和不正確痕跡之間的系統性差異：正確痕跡顯示出有效的恢復（回溯後跟隨策略轉變和驗證），而不正確痕跡則被混淆循環主導（重複的猶豫和未解決的矛盾）。這些診斷信號暗示了在基於強化學習的推理訓練中獎勵塑造和早期停止的應用。
2604.26355.author: Zhenyu Zhao et.al.
2604.26355.authors: Zhenyu Zhao, Sander Land, Dan Bikel, Waseem Alshikh
